PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?actress ?actressLabel WHERE {
  ?film wdt:P161 wd:Q40229 ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?releaseDate) >= 1940 && YEAR(?releaseDate) <= 1949)
  .
  ?film wdt:P161 ?actress .
  ?actress wdt:P21 wd:Q6581072 .
  FILTER(?actress != wd:Q40229)
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?actress rdfs:label ?actressLabel
    FILTER(LANG(?actressLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
